response.original_title: Curious George: Flies a Kite & Other Adventures
response.overview: 3 FUN-FILLED CURIOUS GEORGE ADVENTURES!  CURIOUS GEORGE FILES A KITE: A windy morning provides the perfect opportunity for George to learn about flight. While birds soar in the breeze, and papers float effortlessly, George discovers that bricks don't move at all! But the action really takes off when George and Jumpy the Squirrel unexpectedly hitch a ride on a friend's kite. Now the only thing they need to figure out is how to land!  ZEROS TO DONUTS: George thinks he had learned all he needs to know about the number zero. But when a dozen donuts suddenly turn into a HUNDRED dozen, the little monkey realizes that "nothing" can easily add up to a whole lot of something. Hopefully, the Man with the Yellow Hat likes donuts!  ROLLER MONKEY: When Mr. and Mrs. Dulson ask George to wear roller skates to attract customers to their toy store, things go downhill fast! Our curious friend winds up teaching Hundley the Dog and Gnocchi the Cat a valuable lesson about little wheels and BIG hills!
response.tagline: BE THE FIRST TO SEE 3 FUN-FILLED CURIOUS GEORGE ADVENTURES!
response.title: Curious George: Flies a Kite & Other Adventures
